ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., land-based, sea-based, mountainous) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Current status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, wind speed) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model number or name of the sensor */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was manufactured */,
  "calibration_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the sensor should be calibrated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, faulty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
